raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is reachable and there is free tabletop space to the right/front-right of the cup so it can be displaced without colliding with box_1 or box_2. The push path from the cup toward the chosen free area is unobstructed.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is shifted away from the front area of box_2, creating clearance in front of the boxes for safe arm motion during the box pickup."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right end-effector has lateral access to box_1 and can apply gentle opposing force without contacting box_2 or the table edge.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is laterally constrained to reduce sliding/rotation while separating it from the attached box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector has lateral access to box_2 and there is free space to the right so box_2 can be displaced away from box_1. box_1 remains stabilized by the right arm to avoid both boxes moving together.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is shifted rightward enough to break the attachment/contact with box_1, leaving a visible gap between the two boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is no longer attached to box_2 and there is sufficient lateral clearance on both sides of box_1 for both end-effectors to establish opposing contacts. The cup is out of the pickup path.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by both arms and lifted/controlled off the tabletop (picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is reachable and there is free tabletop space to the right/front-right of the cup so it can be displaced without colliding with box_1 or box_2. The push path from the cup toward the chosen free area is unobstructed.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is shifted away from the front area of box_2, creating clearance in front of the boxes for safe arm motion during the box pickup.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right end-effector has lateral access to box_1 and can apply gentle opposing force without contacting box_2 or the table edge.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is laterally constrained to reduce sliding/rotation while separating it from the attached box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector has lateral access to box_2 and there is free space to the right so box_2 can be displaced away from box_1. box_1 remains stabilized by the right arm to avoid both boxes moving together.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is shifted rightward enough to break the attachment/contact with box_1, leaving a visible gap between the two boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is no longer attached to box_2 and there is sufficient lateral clearance on both sides of box_1 for both end-effectors to establish opposing contacts. The cup is out of the pickup path.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by both arms and lifted/controlled off the tabletop (picked up).
